subject: biology
title: 18M.3.SL.TZ1.15
question_html: Discuss how abiotic factors can affect the distribution of species in an ecosystem.
solution_html:
a. organisms have limits of tolerance and zones of stress 

b. listing any two or more abiotic factors 

c. example of named abiotic factor and how it affects distribution of plant/animal species 

d. example of another named abiotic factor and how it affects distribution of plant/animal species 

e. example of a third named abiotic factor and how it affects distribution of plant/animal species

Award up to 3 marks for valid examples:

light limiting photosynthesis (in a forest) dissolved oxygen affecting respiration in an aquatic animal salinity affecting osmosis in an estuarine species most organisms require a suitable temperature range for their metabolism.
